description: Reclaim.ai is an AI calendar and scheduling product that automatically plans tasks, habits, meetings, and availability across connected calendars. It also offers enterprise identity provisioning and integrations with tools like ChatGPT, Raycast, Zapier, Slack, and task managers.
summary: Reclaim.ai exposes a documented SCIM HTTP API at `https://api.app.reclaim.ai/scim/v2` authenticated with a Reclaim API key, plus a public MCP server at `https://mcp.reclaim.ai/chatgpt` that uses OAuth.
